summary: Iteration 72: Tested dashboard stats API and subscriptions/promotions system. All backend APIs pass (25/25 tests). Frontend verified: Hotel Management shows real data (16 hotels, 39 rooms, 715K FCFA revenue), Communications tab has modern UI with Subscribers/Tickets/Promotions sections, Settings page has Subscriptions section with unsubscribe functionality. SubscribeButton is integrated in HotelDetails.jsx.

minor.issue: Users with operator_id can create promotions regardless of role (customer@test.com has operator_id='Prestige Pressing' assigned). This is design-by-behavior but may need role check.

issues: Chart component shows warnings about width/height being -1 in console (non-blocking)

critical_code_review_comments: management_dashboard.py: Real operator-scoped stats working correctly - pulls from orders, ratings collections
ServiceCommunicationsHub.jsx: Modern UI with Subscribers count, Open Tickets, Promotions Sent stats cards
Settings.jsx: SubscriptionsSection component properly shows user subscriptions with unsubscribe button
HotelDetails.jsx line 611: SubscribeButton integrated next to star rating
seed_data_creation: Used existing data, created TEST_ prefixed subscriptions (cleaned up)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard stats now use useRealDashboardData hook that calls /api/management/dashboard-stats. Communications tab uses ServiceCommunicationsHub component. Settings page has Subscriptions section for customers. SubscribeButton component exists on hotel detail pages. API rate limiting (429) observed during rapid testing but not a code issue.

dashboard_stats_api.details: GET /api/management/dashboard-stats returns real stats from orders/ratings collections

subscriptions_api.details: Subscribe, unsubscribe, check, my, operator-count all working

promotions_api.details: List and create promotions working (sends notifications to subscribers)

hotel_dashboard_ui.details: Shows 16 Hotels, 39 Rooms, 715K FCFA revenue, 3 bookings, 5★ rating

hotel_communications_ui.details: Shows Subscribers (0), Open Tickets (2), Promotions Sent (5), New Promotion button

settings_subscriptions_section.details: Customer settings shows 'Your Subscriptions' with list and Unsubscribe buttons

subscribe_button_hotel_details.details: SubscribeButton component integrated in HotelDetails.jsx at line 611
